# Jack McPickle

> Jack McPickle is an Australian consultant, instructor, and developer who builds digital products, mentors engineering teams, and delivers large-scale e-commerce and platform work worldwide.

## About

- [About Jack McPickle](https://jack.mcpickle.com.au/about): Background, services, and contact details
- [Portfolio home](https://jack.mcpickle.com.au/): Selected work, apps, talks, and FAQs

## Services

- Product strategy and technical consulting
- Platform architecture for e-commerce and web apps
- Hands-on development and team mentoring
- Greenfield builds and legacy platform migrations

## Contact

- Email: jack@mcpickle.com.au
- GitHub: https://github.com/jackmcpickle
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jackmcpickle/

## Key content

- [Selected work](https://jack.mcpickle.com.au/#work): Client projects across e-commerce and platforms
- [Recent apps](https://jack.mcpickle.com.au/#apps): Tools and products Jack has shipped
- [Talks and workshops](https://jack.mcpickle.com.au/#talks): Conference and meetup sessions
- [FAQ](https://jack.mcpickle.com.au/#faq): Common questions about working with Jack

## Technologies

Next.js, React, Magento, Shopify, WordPress, Craft CMS, Astro, TypeScript, Node.js, and headless commerce architectures.
